_comment: Species: Puppet Beast (傀儡兽) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Puppet Beast

canonical.appearance: Constructed puppet beast 2 m, body is spirit-wood and spirit-metal, joints articulate
canonical.size: 2 m adult, 1000 jin; ancient 5 m, 10000 jin
canonical.behavior: Constructed puppet; follows puppet-master's orders; no will of its own
canonical.relationships: Constructed by puppet cultivators; Wang Lin used puppets
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: puppet_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
